description: Migrate apps/reading-advantage controllers, actions, scripts, and route handlers off Prisma onto the unified Drizzle schema. Final step removes apps/reading-advantage/lib/prisma.ts, prisma/, and Prisma deps.
deviation_notes: Reopened by 2026-05-23 review and re-closed the same day: three runtime SQL blockers fixed — dashboard-summary-controller raw SQL now uses unified Drizzle/Postgres names (commit 9b7661a); assignment-prediction-service getAtRiskStudents() uses a.created_at (commit 58a356f); query-optimizer.executeOptimizedRaw rebinds $n placeholders via parameterized Drizzle sql fragments (commit 0ca2e1b). New jest coverage in __test__/dashboard-summary-controller.test.ts, __test__/assignment-prediction-service.test.ts, __test__/query-optimizer.test.ts uses PgDialect.sqlToQuery to assert column-name correctness and parameter binding. __test__/ suite green: 11 suites / 194 tests. AC#1-4 + AC#5 (targeted) + AC#7 PASS. Full app-wide jest still deferred to CI/faster hardware (see tech-debt 'reading-advantage jest verification deferred').
